title: A Very British CPAC: Few, if Any, Costumes and Not Much Trump
summary_full: London hosted an understated version of the Conservative Political Action Conference, known in the United States for its over-the-top celebration of MAGA causes.
summary_public: London hosted an understated version of the Conservative Political Action Conference, known in the United States for its over-the-top celebration of MAGA causes.
